Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are asked Assume you have an event log stored in a DuckDB table named event log with each row representing a single event The table has at least the following columns case id activity and timestamp Each case id groups events that belong to a single process instance or case

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce a DuckDB SQL query The query should filter out cases with more than six events and return all events for cases with six or fewer events

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can do this with a subquery or CTE that counts events per case then join back to the original table to filter

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Simplest SELECT el FROM event log el JOIN SELECT case id FROM event log GROUP BY case id HAVING COUNT less than or equal to 6 AS filtered cases ON el case id equals filtered cases case id

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Alternatively using a WHERE EXISTS SELECT FROM event log el WHERE EXISTS SELECT 1 FROM event log sub WHERE sub case id equals el case id GROUP BY sub case id HAVING COUNT less than or equal to 6 But the join approach is straightforward

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to ensure we return all columns The prompt says returns only the events from cases that have six or fewer events in total It does not specify which columns but we can assume we want all columns So we can use SELECT all

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: But we might want to be explicit SELECT case id activity and timestamp But since the table has at least those columns and possibly others using all is fine However it is often better to specify columns for clarity

Name: Validation - IND
Text: We should also consider ordering Not required But we can add ORDER BY case id timestamp if needed But not necessary

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus the answer WITH case counts AS SELECT case id COUNT all AS event count FROM event log GROUP BY case id SELECT el all FROM event log el JOIN case counts cc ON el case id equals cc case id WHERE cc event count less than or equal to 6

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We should ensure that the query is correct for DuckDB DuckDB supports standard SQL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The prompt says Be sure to consider the correct grouping and filtering to achieve this result So we need to show grouping and filtering

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will produce a query with a CTE for clarity
